caption: A person's hand is shown placing a transparent plastic sleeve over a trading card box resting on a black surface with red accents. The background features a logo that reads "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the camera perspective shifts from a close-up of the hand and the box to a wider shot showing a man sitting in a room with equipment and shelves in the background. The man is wearing a black shirt and is looking toward the camera. The scene then alternates back to the close-up view of the hand manipulating the plastic sleeve over the box, which has green and white graphic elements on its packaging. The movement is repetitive, alternating between the detailed action of sleeving the box and the wider view of the person managing the process in his workspace.
